data.body:
Interactive env-var review — decision log (vars 1-6 of ~40):
1. REBAR_ROOT — KEEP (foundational repo-root override; standard <TOOL>_ROOT).
2. PROJECT_ROOT — REMOVE (unprefixed duplicate of REBAR_ROOT; DSO/plugin-era; hard remove per user).
3. REBAR_CONFIG — KEEP (config-file pointer; matches RUFF_CONFIG/PIP_CONFIG_FILE convention).
4. TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR — MODIFY: rename REBAR_TRACKER_DIR (decoupled/renamed store is a SUPPORTED feature per user; alias old name during deprecation).
5. REBAR_PUSH — MODIFY: rename REBAR_SYNC_PUSH (outbound push policy always/async/off; alias REBAR_PUSH).
6. REBAR_NO_SYNC — MODIFY: rename REBAR_SYNC_PULL (inbound fetch/merge; flip negative boolean -> positive on/off, default on; alias REBAR_NO_SYNC; --no-sync flag -> --no-pull). Vars 5+6 unify the sync model under REBAR_SYNC_{PUSH,PULL} so naming reflects direction.
